L

LABEL_OFFSET - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
 
LABEL_Y - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D
 
lastDragSceneX - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
lastDragSceneY - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
 
Layout(boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
Creates an instance of a Layout record class.
lettersOnSouthEdge - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
The field for the lettersOnSouthEdge record component.
lettersOnSouthEdge() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
Returns the value of the lettersOnSouthEdge record component.
lineExtensionCandidates(Board, List<Position>) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.player.HuntShootingStrategy
The two cells just past each end of an already-established line of hits.
listeners - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
listeners - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
listeners - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Listeners are UI/controller wiring, not game state, so they are excluded from serialization and re-created empty on every load (see Board.readObject(java.io.ObjectInputStream)).
listenForKonamiCode() - Method in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
 
load() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.controller.persistence.SavedGameRepository
Reads back the previously saved Game, exactly as it was when SavedGameRepository.save(com.example.battleship.model.Game) was called -- both boards, every ship's hit history, and whose turn it is.
loadMainScreen(Stage) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.Main
(Re)loads a fresh main screen into stage.
